paper_title: Automatic Security Evaluation and (Related-key) Differential Characteristic Search: Application to SIMON, PRESENT, LBlock, DES(L) and Other Bit-oriented Block Ciphers
default_next_action: If the generated r5 lane drifts from the paper checkpoint, repair the IR-to-instantiation mapping before extending the workflow.

cases.description: IR-generated 5-round PRESENT-80 checkpoint lane compared against Appendix A.1 Table 4 using the exact S-box model.
cases.expected_claim: Table 4 reports that the minimum number of active S-boxes for 5-round PRESENT-80 is 3.
cases.next_action_on_unresolved: Repair the IR-to-instantiation mapping or raise solve confidence before treating the generated lane as a trusted demo.
